series_metadata.series_description: Materials and forms used to obtain authorization and payment for out-of-state travel

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Four (4) years afdter close of fiscal year in which created then destroy, provided all audits have been completed and all discrepancies corrected. ; Electronic: Four (4) years afdter close of fiscal year in which created then destroy, provided all audits have been completed and all discrepancies corrected., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
